title: Crisp Citrus Spanish Shrimp Paella
description: A briny and light Spanish dish featuring succulent shrimp, infused with the warmth of cayenne pepper, perfect for a romantic evening.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side, then set aside.
Add the smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, sea salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir for 1 minute.
Add the cauliflower rice to the skillet, stirring to combine with the spice mixture, and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return the shrimp to the skillet and stir to combine with the cauliflower rice mixture.
Cook, uncovered, for an additional 2 minutes, until the shrimp are heated through and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
